name: autocomplete-jedi-redux
description: Python packages, variables, methods and functions with their arguments autocompletion powered by Jedi

pythonCommand.title: Python Command
pythonCommand.description: Python interpreter command. Supports whitespace-separated arguments, e.g. `python3`, `py -3` or `C:/venv/Scripts/python.exe`. Use `$PROJECT` or `$PROJECT_NAME` for project-specific paths, e.g. `$PROJECT/.venv/Scripts/python.exe`. The daemon restarts automatically when this setting changes.

extraPaths.title: Extra Paths
extraPaths.description: Semicolon-separated list of additional directories added to `sys.path` for completions and go-to-definition. Use `$PROJECT` or `$PROJECT_NAME` substitutions. Add the parent of any package not installed in your Python environment.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Autocomplete suggestion priority. Lower value means higher priority relative to other providers. The built-in snippets provider has priority 2.

triggerRegex.title: Trigger Regex
triggerRegex.description: Regular expression that determines when completions are triggered. By default completions trigger after words, dots, spaces and `(`. Restart required after changing.

showDocStrings.title: Show Doc Strings
showDocStrings.description: Show doc strings from functions, classes and modules in completion descriptions.

fuzzyMatching.title: Fuzzy Matching
fuzzyMatching.description: Enable fuzzy matching for completions. Typing `stdr` will match `stderr`.

showErrors.title: Show Errors
showErrors.description: Show Jedi error notifications. Critical errors are always shown regardless of this setting.

debugLogs.title: Debug Logs
debugLogs.description: Log debug output to the developer console. May slow down the editor.
